title: August 23
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 23''' is the 235th day of the year (236th in leap years). There are 130 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1925|1925]] – [[Alfredo Alcala]] is born.
*[[1930s#1935|1935]] – [[Ronald Falk]] is born.
*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Terry Austin]] is born.
*[[1960s#1961|1961]] – [[Alexandre Desplat]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Ray Park]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 29|''Star Wars Weekly'' 29]] published.
*[[1979]] – [[Clare Grant]] is born.
*[[1999]] – [[Star Wars Insider 45|''Star Wars Insider'' 45]] published.
*[[2000]] – [[Jedi Council: Acts of War 3|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 3]] published.
*2000 – [[Star Wars (1998) 21|''Star Wars'' (1998) 21]] published.
*[[2004]] – [[Art of Revenge]] picture series starts on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|''Hyperspace'']].
*[[2005]] – [[Brock Peters]] dies.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Remembering Ralph McQuarrie: Dreamer and Visionary]]'' published.
*2012 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.37]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – [[Gilbert Taylor]] dies.
*[[2017]] – [[Doctor Aphra Annual 1|''Doctor Aphra Annual'' 1]] published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Thrawn Villain Pack]]'' released.
*[[2022]] – [[Star Wars: Crimson Reign (TPB)|''Star Wars: Crimson Reign'' trade paperback]] published.
*2022 – [[Star Wars: The Mandalorian - The Art & Imagery Collector's Edition, Volume Two]] published in paperback.
*[[2023]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 35|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 35]] published.
*[[2024]] – "[[Nubs's Big Mistake / The Jedi Rescue]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
